Idk, I was overly focused on the Carousel, which several of us Crew peeps paid the said price, hopped up, over, and all around the up and down moving colorfully decorated horses. Goofy pics I tell ya, but not Yelpable. 

Additional info on Amtrak:
http://www.yelp.com/biz/amtrak-santa-barbara-station-santa-barbara?hrid=ccn2qphDwAAb9vQf_TCV1g#src:self

Chase Palm Park Center:
Walking along the palm trees lined park, with the ocean on the flip-side of the street makes for a bery weelaxing afternoon, as well as a playful time at the Shipwreck Playground, where we took full advantage of all the nooks and crannies we could squeeze through, climb over and under. 

If you ever require a respite from the flurry and hustle of the beach traffic on the other side of the street, get on over to the Chase Palm Park and don't forget to get a ride on the merry-go-round. They won't say anything if you put on your invisible monkey suit and go ape.

Great playground in SB.  Totally looks like a shipwreck. They have separate play equipment for the younger (under 5 years old) and older (over 5 years old) kids.  We were there on a Monday morning.  Just a few kids around so my 3 year old had fun running around the place, without fear of being run over by older kids.  Clean and well kept.

This is a gorgeous playground within Chase Palm Park that has several play and climbing structures that, yes, collectively evoke the parts of a wrecked ship. Some of the structures are theoretically accessible while others necessarily involve stepping, climbing, or hanging. Still, the custom-designed space offers a number of spaces for younger kiddos to explore and conquer, all while nodding to the area's maritime history.

Surrounding the play area are plenty of picnic tables and benches. The play area itself is nestled deep within the park, far from streets and traffic, and is close to a shallow creek that runs through the park. The overall venue was in good condition when I stopped by.

This is a fun park, but there are a lot of homeless people present. Also, groups of guys kept riding their bikes through the play area with their music blasting. They ended up setting up shop right next to the play area, drinking alcohol and listening to music with explicit lyrics. Call me conservative, but this was not the atmosphere I wanted for my littles, so we left.

name: Cal Coast Adventures
categories: Paddleboarding, Active Life, Tours, Hotels & Travel, Surfing, Rafting/Kayaking, Bike Rentals, Fitness & Instruction, Trainers

yelp_reviews.text:
I rented a high end road bike from these guys, and I have to say, they are awesome! The business is well run, and staffed with friendly professionals. Here are more details of my experience:
When the bike was delivered to my vacation rental, Brian was not only on time, but was early. He was very friendly and professional, and  spent about 20min making sure I was all set to go. He even took the time to review a route that I had planned in google maps and helped me make adjustments. I proceeded to have a great day of road biking on a very nice, we'll maintained bike! When Brian returned to pick up the bike at the end of the day, he took interest in how my ride went, and was very much making sure everything went great. I will definitely use these guys again.

Did a stand up paddle board lesson/tour for a group of five and it was terrific.  Peter did a nice job with the instruction and made everyone feel at ease.  He pointed out a bunch of interesting things in the harbor and some interesting local facts.  Mitch was very easy to book with and very responsive.

These guys were great! I rented a road bike from them for a week of riding in Santa Barbara. They dropped off a nice Cannondale Synapse at the house I was staying at before I arrived, and picked it up after I left. They left me a helmet, bottles, and floor pump as well. It was a hassle free way to get a high end bike for the week. 

I also hired John to take me riding the first day. We had a great ride, and he showed me a bunch of other routes for the rest of my trip.

Everybody in this operation was top notch. Very responsive and stayed with my family longer than our allotted stand up paddleboarding time to make sure we got the best experience - it even involved switching locations because the wind was too high at the original spot. I truly appreciate Mitch, Nate, Max and the rest of the team. Great guys and great activities - best experience we could've hoped for!

Wow!! As good as it gets!! I was recently in the Santa Barbara area looking for something different to do. I found CCA on google and was extremely interested in renting electric bikes (ebikes). I have a 10 yr old daughter and wanted to know if she could ride one so I sent an email w my inquiry. I was told she was too young and couldn't rent one. I was very disappointed.

To my complete and utter surprise, I received an email from Mitch (owner??) the next day letting me know that he had done additional research and it turned out my daughter could ride! I was ecstatic and reserved ebikes immediately.

When we arrived, Mitch was super! He patiently explained everything to us, and let us ride the ebikes in the parking lot to familiarize ourselves before hitting the streets! We had an absolute blast! Those babies are soooo much fun! Can't wait to go back!

Mitch and CCA are absolutely fantastic! They are very professional, their place clean & organized. They have plenty of inventory and stock top of the line equipment! Very very nice. This is the type of experience you really want! Thx so much guys! Can't wait to rent again!!!
Had a great hike with the guide Connor in Montecito.  He was friendly and knew the trails.  Will definitely do this again next time I visit that part of California.

We're staying at the Four Seasons Santa Barbara and rented a Standup Paddleboard from Cal Coast Adventures which has a tent up on the beach in front of the hotel. Elias helped me get situated on the Paddleboard and gave me all the instructions and tips for success! He's a great guy and I had a great day on the water!

My boyfriend and I went by there today to rent some paddle boards. They have a convenient spot located right on the beach next to the pier in Santa Barbara. The service was amazing, and well priced. I've never been paddle boarding and Nick was the best teacher. He was patient and really helped me understand how to ride the board so I would have the best experience possible. I definitely recommend CalCoast Adventures! Go by and ask for Nick, he's the best.

This was the 2nd time we rented road bikes from this awesome shop.   The bikes they provide are newer models, in excellent shape, with the latest equipment, like electronic shifters.  Each bike has a pouch, stocked with a tube and tools, in case of a  flat tire.  Believe me, not all bike shops supply those.  We learned that the hard way,  in the middle of the French countryside.   The owner is super friendly.  We went to the shop and had all the bikes fitted, then they delivered them to our hotel to be stored until the next morning.   

I highly recommend this company.  They also rent equipment for other sports, like surfing.   We have not rented any of those items but I'm sure the standards will be just as high.

We drove up to Santa Barbara for the day to celebrate my daughter's 18th birthday. She wanted to rent stand up paddleboards. Since we were all beginners, Cal Coast suggested we come early while it is calm. We showed up at the bicycle rental place first, not sure where to go. They directed us to their place just north of the pier. We rented 8 SUP's and had a fantastic time. The woman who helped us was super helpful and personal and upbeat. She gave us tips on getting started, and everyone got up pretty quickly! 

I am so glad we rented through Cal Coast Adventures. Everyone had a fantastic time. The price was reasonable and the service was fantastic!!

SB Fitness Tours is fantastic. If you book with them you will not be disappointed! 

My fiance and I are getting married in Santa Barbara this summer and have been making multiple trips to Santa Barbara from San Francisco to plan our wedding. During our most recent trip I decided to book a mountain biking tour with SB Fitness Tours. Everything was a breeze, from booking our reservation to getting pick up at our hotel. Additionally, our guide Jesse was not only very experienced but also amazing. He gave us multiple trial options based on our experience and comfort level and then provided helpful feedback to make our scenic climb exceptional and safe. 

I was so pleased with SB Fitness Tours that I am planning on including their information on our wedding website where l be referring them to my closest friends and family. Thanks SB Fit Tours! You guys ROCK!

Great experience renting beach cruisers here. The staff explained things clearly and for us set up quickly. The prices were great compared to the rental stations by the hotels. The bike locks worked out very well. The staff gave us great advice on places to go and eat. Overall, great price & experience. Would recommend to anyone.

Mitch at SB fitness yours was GREAT. I was doing my first triathlon in SB and had no clue what kind of bike or pedals to get. He was very patient and incredibly helpful. Set me up on a great bike and provided me with my wetsuit for the tri as well. If you're ever in SB for the triathlon come here. It's the one stop shop for all your triathlon needs!! Mitch and his crew are all super friendly and very helpful. 5 stars for sure.

We took a day trip to Santa Barbara and decided to rent a couple electric bikes.  Everyone we met at Cal Coast Adventures was friendly and helpful.  We rented their Townie bikes for 3 hours and cruised all over the city.  They are pedal assisted electric bikes, after a couple minutes you get the hang of it.  We had such a great time and I highly recommend Cal Coast for your rental needs.

I rented from them for the 3rd time. I got a high end road bike to use each time I was in the area. They have been perfect everytime, including the bike, the delivery, the pick up, and the information and ease of renting from them.
I will rent from them again when I get back in the area.

My review is based on a surf lesson. I called the day before and had the pleasure of setting an appointment with Conner who was very helpful and courteous. He made the transaction smooth and was able to offer 10% off their price due to an old ad they offered on Groupon. I went for a solo lesson with Kent on December 31, 2017 bright and early on New Year's Eve. I was stoked they were able to accommodate me on some what of a holiday. Kent was helpful and offered great start up advice. The waves weren't the best which they did advise me of but it was no deal breaker for me. All in all a great experience for a first timer-

Rented a tandem kayak to paddle the harbor at West Beach with my daughter. Noah was on duty.  He was awesome!  Polite, informative, helpful guy. Told us everything we needed to know to navigate safely around the harbor.

Perfect experience for novice paddlers.  Go early for the calmest waters and least water traffic.

Great help for our rentals! 
I came to SB for a triathlon, my FIRST one of many I hope, so they were able to help me figure out what type of bike I wanted to rent. The bikes were great, and for how much they were worth and for how much they were rented out for was such a great deal we could not pass up!
We had one mix up when we were ordering the bikes, but they easily fixed it over the phone, no problem. Just make sure to call possibly a couple days before to ensure that you got the bike that you want, because you order your bikes online.
And get this, THEY DELIVER! It made everything so much easier! The staff was REALLY GREAT. When they came to deliver the bike, they really tried to make sure that I knew all there was to know about the bike and what to do if there were any cases such as flat tire, adjustments, etc.

The guys were so great and so knowledgeable about everything! Mitch and Nick were super helpful! Thanks so much for making my first triathlon easier with your help!

We're staying at the Four Seasons Santa Barbara and rented a Standup Paddleboard from Cal Coast Adventures, which has a tent up on the beach in front of the hotel. Elias helped me get situated on a Paddleboard and gave me all the instructions and tips for success! He's a really great guy and I had a great day on the water!

Great day with the fine crew and excellent gear provided by Cal Coast.   Staff could not be friendlier or more helpful.  Special thanks to Caleb who helped out my teenagers who lost track of time (grrrr) and ended up on the other side of the shipping channel at closing.   Everyone had a great experience paddle boarding in such an exceptionally beautiful place.   Thanks Cal Coast!  We will be back.

We rented surfboard from these guys while in Santa Barbara and they were great! They helped recommend some great beginner surfing spots in the area and looked up the status of the waves for us. We were able to rent boards and wetsuits to keep for 24 hours at a really affordable rate! We would definitely rent from these guys again!

Had a wonderful time kayaking with my son while my daughter paddle boarded for the 1st time. Ryan was awesome and friendly! He quickly checked us in and gave us a quick lesson which helped put our nerves at ease. Would definitely do this again!!

I was visiting with my boyfriend and his family this weekend from the Bay Area. This was my first time on a kayak and I'm terrified of the water. Ian and Andrew were super patient with me. It took me a while to get used to being out in the water and even though I know how to swim I still had the option to wear a life vest. Very relaxing sunny adventure. My bf even had his cousins kid fall in and request that one of the guys ride with him instead cause it made him feel safer and they accommodated. We were out for a while and there was no real rush to get back. Nice guys who check in on us especially since I have a fear of the water. I would definitely go again and recommend.

This review is for the surf instruction. I moved to California recently and learning to surf was on the top of my to do list. I randomly stumbled upon the SB Surf School and so glad I did! My first lesson was with Graham who was wonderful. He made me feel safe and confident out in the water. I have also had a lesson with Dustin who was amazing. He was really supportive and gave me helpful tips. I was able to get up and surf during my 2nd lesson! The wet suit rental and board rental is a breeze as well - good quality gear. Highly recommend!

We did a two-day rental of hybrid bikes from Cal Coast Adventures, over Memorial Day weekend.  From the first phone call I made to them, through the end of the weekend, the entire experience couldn't have been better.  Owner Mitch was super-helpful and friendly; the bikes were high quality and well maintained.  Our first day of riding was with two guides for our adult group of 7 riders.  We pedaled through town, stopping briefly at some points of interest.  Then we cycled up around Mountain Drive.  Fantastic views and really pleasant riding!  It was so nice not to have to think about navigation, as we were new to town.  As a bonus, they helped us choose a hike for a subsequent day on our own.  Their advice was spot-on and made our hiking experience better than it otherwise might have been.  We hope to return to Santa Barbara and would absolutely go back to Cal Coast Adventures.

Would HIGHLY recommend Santa Barbara Fitness Tours to anyone wanting to try stand up paddle boarding.

My group of three women had never been paddle boarding before but, because of SB Fitness Tours, had an amazing time.

The gear is in perfect condition and the staff is extremely helpful and friendly.

Connor was wonderful.  We enjoyed our electric bike tour more than we could have imagined.  We rode up and down so many streets and beach views. Stopping to look at different views, like the sneak peek at the Giraffes from the beach area, and take pictures.  Stopping to give history on the differnt areas.  State Street is beautiful, Mission Street was a lot of history and on and on we rode with ease and comfort. Within that 2.5 hours of electric bike tour, Connor made sure we were comfortable, hydrated and informed at all times.  By far this was one of the most memorable trip adventures.  Not to mention we got to take along our small dogs via our own front pack carriers....we were eye candy  because of them....Brownie and Cookie very much enjoyed their rides and the stops in between.  The court house is just gorgouse, and all of the area is full of greenery every where you go....Make sure to ask about the fig tree and please do enjoy the trip down State Street, I weeeeeeeeeee'd it all the way down.  Thanks for an awesome adventure.
The Brittingham's
The bike rental was quick and easy.  Connor was great and very helpful in suggesting a few places to see.
Such a friendly, helpful and awesome place! Close to the Cabrillo bike path and all the local sights.  I would highly recommend renting from them if you're in the area!
Very happy the guys at Cal Coast Adventures could get me on a road bike the same day I called. The bike worked great! The rental included a helmet and two water bottles! Highly recommend
Had a blast with Connor and Nate! Best tour guides! We got to try a bunch of great wines & beers and they were patient with our big group. Definitely recommend!

We loved our tour guide and the corgi. If you've never done it, paddle boarding is easy and fun -- especially early in the morning when the waves are gentle. She took us through the marina and peppered trivia along the loop. Beautiful location and highly, highly recommended for the value and customer service.
Soo friendly and helpful!  We rented bikes to ride around Santa Barbara.  The bikes were in great condition and we had a blast!  I would definitely recommend and I would absolutely go back again!

These guys are wonderful! I had the pleasure of dealing with John and Nate, who went out of their way to provide exceptional service and a memorable experience. They are adventure sports enthusiasts and provided great local insight.
Because of the weather, we had to shift gears. Connor was amazing at providing a quick alternative. This is a company that finds a way. Thank you for making our afternoon an enjoyable one.

The best tour guide was Connor! We came into town for a company trip and wanted to do a tour of Santa Barbara on bikes. Unfortunately, it was raining but they were quick to accommodate and take us around the area anyways! 
Highly recommend to anyone visiting to learn about Santa Barbara history and hotspots!

I saw an add on pinkbike.com one day and called the number on it some guy named mitch talked to me about a bike I saw. Next day I told my self I want to see that bike, so I started driving from my house in san ferrnando valley CA. I drove 2 hours to santa barbara and I got to this bike shop I talked to the guy that I spoke on the phone he showed me the bike and gave me a great deal, his mechanical engineer was a smart guy and an honest salesmen I loved him and the guy who sold me the bike his name was mitch any want a full suspension bike call this place they have cheap abd afordable bikes. Thanks mitch

The team at Cal Coast was very nice, knowledgeable, and helpful!  This was my first e-bike experience and I'm hooked - I would highly recommend exploring Santa Barbara by e-bike.  The bikes worked really well and the recommended route on the map from Cal Coast was beautiful - along the beach then through Montecito.  Have to give a shout out to Nate who was super friendly and set us up with bikes. Nothing but a great experience from start to finish!

My wife chose an electric bike tour with this company y as an activity for an award trip for work.  At first I laughed as those bikes look ridiculous but will tell you it was outstanding.  The only bad thing was it didn't last long enough.  Nate was our guide and he was outstanding and super knowledgeable about the area and great to ride with.  If you do this, I would be shocked if you don't have a good time.

These guys are the best! We were out in Carpinteria. Ordered a bunch of paddle boards and surfboards. They delivered to us within hours and picked up the gear to the minute they said they would. These guys catered to every request we had. We would use them again in a second and recommend them to anyone. 
Awesome job! Thanks for everything!

We are visiting from NJ and had found this tour on trip advisor and decided to give the electric bike tour a try.  We made it to the shop and met with our tour guide, Shawn (or is it Sean?  Not sure).  Name spelling aside, he got us mounted and ready to go in no time.  We were luckily the only two people on the tour so it was basically a private tour.  

The bikes were awesome, you can tell that they are well maintained and they worked perfectly.

Shawn brought us all over Santa Barbara and was very knowledgeable about all the stops.  The pace was comfortable and his breaks were well timed and he was very helpful with making suggestions of where to pick up snacks or extra drinks.  We biker a total of 12+ miles and enjoyed every minute of it.  Shawn made the tour, hands down.  Super friendly, super personable and super knowledgeable.  I couldn't recommend him more and I highly recommend taking this tour!

An exceptional electric bike tour of the area, winding us through the beautiful hills of Montecito.  Nate, our guide, was especially accommodating to our needs, conversive, informative and just an absolute pleasure to spend two hours with.  Highly recommend both the tour and Cal Coast Adventures.
Fun and delightful, fast and easy to check in. Parking available. inexpensive for priceless fun! Beautiful sights!

First class operation with great equipment.
We live in Santa Barbara and I always wanted to try out an electric bike. It was very easy getting bikes from Cal Coast. There were a couple different e-bike options; they were clean and maintained. Thank you.

This was a fantastic company to work with.  

We did a surf lesson for our kids (11 and 7 year olds). It was the kids first time surfing and the instructor couldn't have been better with them.  The instructor showed them what to do and then took them out to the ocean.    The kids loved every minute of the 1:30 minute lesson and can not stop talking about John.

We also did a mountain bike tour for beginners.  Sergio the instructor was also great.  Again the kid had never been mountain biking but learned quickly with Sergio.  The ride was on the ridge of a mountain overlooking the water for parts and the other parts were thru fields.  Sergio made sure to take us on single tracks and thru wider parts. There was also a little side trip to the beach.  The boys could not have been happier with Sergio.

We also rented bikes which were delivered to the hotel.  This was great because everything was done over the phone and we just had to sign the paperwork when the bikes were dropped off.

Everyone I dealt with at this company was very friendly and professional.  It was a pleasure dealing with people like this.  I would highly recommend this company.
Everyone at Cal Coast was terrific! Helpful,  knowledgeable and flexible. Great bikes too!!!

Had no real expectations...booked group bike tour and we were the only two that should up so we ended up having are own private tour. It was a really nice ride and we took in a lot of sights. Our tour guide was really friendly and personable. We were able to go at our own pace which was great because I wasn't feeling 100% well. The only negative if any would be the location. Since we took the shuttle there it let us off about .5 mile away from the location so we had to walk the rest of the way and it wasn't a pleasurable walk. It was in an industrial area. However, once our tour guy knew we shuttled/walked there he offered to drop us back off to our hotel. That was very nice of him. Would book again. Oh, bikes were clean and easy to ride.

We had such a great time! We rented a double kayak and paddle board to go out! We visited the sand bar beach across the way and it was incredible and super calm :) the attendant, Nick, was extremely helpful and super knowledgeable about the area and where we should go out! He even took a great picture of our group! Would definitely come back!

This was my first time renting a road bike from Cal Coast adventures.  It was for a 4 day ride from Monterey to Santa Barbara, about 289 miles.  I rode the bike around the local streets checking gears, brakes, tire and size.  Everything seemed fine.  Before leaving I asked to see the spare tubes.  The only tube in the tool bag on my bike was punctured and flat, the air cartridge was spent.  They put in another tube and new cartridge and I asked to buy some additional tubes just in case.  They declined saying that they only rent bikes and it's up to you to provide your own tubes.  I thought that was strange especially since this was a one week rental for a Southern California  coast multi day ride.  Of course you would provide (or at lease sell) tubes?! I transported the bike to Santa Barbara on the train and bus and began to ride.  Unfortunately after 15 minutes of riding from the Monterey airport my rear tire became flat.  I changed the tube with the provided replacement and inflated with the provided air cartridge but it failed to inflate.  The valve was bent and couldn't be repaired so I installed the other spare, inflated to pressure, and 15 minutes of blissful riding later another flat!  I was so disappointed but walked 15 minutes to a repair hop in pacific grove and found that my bicycle tire had the wrong sized tubes!  I called rental shop to let them know what happened and they basically said "sorry to hear you had problems."  It was very frustrating but ultimately after paying the repair shop to replace and to sell me additional tubes I was able to continue and complete my ride without further problems.  The ride was excellent and the bike was in very good shape.  I had hoped that Cal Coast would offer to pay for the tubes that I had to buy, but they didn't when I let them know about the problems I had with their tubes.

My husband and I went on the private electric bike tour and loved it. Our guide was so awesome. Showed us a bunch of places and made some great recommendations. The electric bikes they have are amazing too. I want to try their kayak or paddle boarding tour next!!

Signed up for the electric bike tour, had a phenomenal time. Nate was the tour guide- 10/10. He did a great job. If you want to see a whole lot of Santa Barbara but aren't sure where to start, or don't want to spend more time than necessary researching, this is your place. The ebike tour covered quite a bit of ground. Would absolutely book again and am very much looking forward to the next trip.

Fantastic customer service. Rented a carrier and ebike. 5 minutes in we had a daughter that did not want to be a passenger and wanted to ride her own bike. Went back at the mercy of CCA and they didn't bat an eye - wasted no time - and we settled 3 hours later when I dropped of carrier. They were friendly, quick and without hesitatin refunded the rental that did not work out. HIghly recommend.
Great experience with the electric bikes! Staff super friendly and helpful. Bikes in excellent condition. We will definitely go back and rent again.
Awesome Stand Up Paddleboard lesson with Robert!  Thanks for the instruction and the fun.  I'm confident I can rent a board and go on my own tomorrow!!!

Had the best time biking around the beautiful Santa Barbara today. Only made better with the huge help of NATE. He got us all set up with our bikes and even recommended a great route for us. Thank you Nate!!!!

Just got done with my stand up paddle board lesson with Emily and it was INCREDIBLE. Before signing up, I visited the Cal Coast office with questions about the various lessons that were offered. ALL of the office staff was friendly and answered all of my questions. 
During the lesson Emily made me feel extremely comfortable. She was very knowledgeable about the history of Santa Barbara and gave me really useful tips for paddle boarding. This was my first experience on the water but it definitely won't be my last. I will be back for kayak and surf lessons this summer!
Cal Coast, you scored big hiring Emily.. she's a keeper!
Very nice we did 1 hour bike everything was ready sanitize when we arrived clean they explained to us nicely I highly recommend

Had a fantastic e-bike tour of Santa Barbara. I signed up for the private tour and took my twin 12 year old boys. Tour guides Ally and Nate were so great! We got to see so much of the area. Ally and Nate took the time to answer questions and give recommendations. The bike tour is a must in your list when visiting Santa Barbara!
Rented bikes on two occasions. Excellent service and a good selection of  bikes.  All employees were wearing masks during covid. Thanks!

My friends and I went to Santa Bárbara for a girls weekend, kayaking with Evan was probably the highlight of it all. Super fun! He was so nice and very patient with us Would definitely recommend this to anyone in the area!

We rented 2 bikes & a bike trailer for us and our 2 toddlers. Great social distancing practices - giant bottle of sanitizer at the [outside] desk, forms can be filled out online to avoid unnecessary contact, everything done outside. They were friendly & very accommodating when we changed our minds to rent the extra trailer. I would definitely rent from them again.
Went on a kayaking trip and rented a few with friends from this place. A really nice guy named Ryan helped us out and watched all of our stuff for us and helped us with whatever we needed.

My kids never wanted to stop surfing because of the great, fun instructors. Nick, another guy with curly hair and Ally literally pushed my sons for hours (not sure how they were able to do so for so long!). They never gave up on my boys and came
with a full force of energy and fun until all my kids learned to surf. It was an amazing experience. Ally did everything she could to make us feel comfortable and happy.

Great bunch of people who work there, Conner, Elias. I have been renting bikes and ebikes for years and if there is ever an issue (which only has been once) they are very responsive. 
I have only had good experiences with this Cal Coast. I recommend them to friends and family visiting Santa Barbara.

Easy to reserve your bikes online.
Fast and friendly service.
Good quality bikes.
Made our day in Santa Bárbara super fun!

This is a great place to rent bikes from! We were able to walk up from our hotel and rent some on the spot. After discussing our destination, they helped us choose the best bike to get to the local mission (one with gears thank goodness). Staff is super friendly and helpful. Rentals come with helmets and a lock for the bike. The place also offered surfing and other lessons, and if I was looking for those stuff I would go there as well. Thanks for a great time :)

Checked this place out today with the wife and kids. Awesome place to rent bikes and ride along the coast! Everything was contactless and super quick process and prices were very decent! Shout out to Conner! This dude was super helpful/friendly! Will definitely be coming back here.

What an awesome day! My friend and I headed up to SB from Malibu and ran into some traffic. Mitch was super accommodating and made it seem like no big deal even though we kept him waiting for almost 40 min. We still spend 2 awesome hours out on the paddle boards, and even on a windy day Mitch found some cool spots for us to try out and made us very adventuresome! He made us feel super comfortable and I would definitely refer Mitch and SB Fitness tours to anyone!

Christine gave us the best tour ever. We went farther out than we planned and she was so quick to give us local tips. I mentioned I wanted to jump in the water so she took us to a beach to let me be a kid and jump in. 100% satisfaction! Thanks Christine!
The employees were super friendly and helpful! No better place to rent some beach cruisers from for riding around Santa Barbara.

This place was awesome! Super cheap surfing gear rentals and the staff was very nice and helpful. And special shoutout to Brody for helping us get the gear set up on the car showing us how it works AND giving us some of his favorite surf and dinner spots to check out. Wish i could give 6 stars

We loved our e-bike tour with Sergio! We came up for a day trip from LA and wanted to see the most we could, including the mission and the Presidio. This is the way to do it. We booked a group tour, but ended up on a private tour with just us two and Sergio, a local from Santa Barbara who was the best. He took us all around the city, making sure to stop for the best photo opportunities, teach us about the history of the city, and always check to make sure us and our bikes were doing alright. We had an amazing time and would do it again in a heartbeat!
Me and my bf had a great time kayaking with Maddie, our tour guide. She took us around the Harbor and we saw seals, star fish, pelicans. Overall, we had a great experience. Thank you Maddie!

Let me tell you...we had the most wonderful time on the water thanks to our guide Christine. She was equally knowledgeable of the area as well as just a wonderful company. Who knew exercise could be so fun?
You want good service.   This is the place you will get it.  Lots of electric bikes to rent and helpful hints from the entire staff. Highly recommend them.
Reserved the night before and wasn't able to make it due to traffic. However, customer service was amazing and really accommodated to our schedule. Will be returning.

Excellent-happy service. We showed up to rent a few bikes and the process was a breeze. They hand you the bikes and a map then off you go. The bikes were well maintained and the ride along the coast was beautiful. Easy peasy!
We had such an amazing time on our hybrid bikes ! Jimmy & Conor were so sweet and really added to our experience ! Highly recommend !

I rented a kayak from the location next to the pier. Young person in charge of rental was very helpful, of course they have some Covid restrictions, masks are required while checking in and you drag your kayak to ocean. I was 10 minutes late but they did not charge me extra. Overall nice experience, and kayak was very good quality

My family and I rented ebikes and we absolutely loved them. My son is 14, my mom is in her 60s, and my husband and I all had so much fun. Staff was super friendly and did a great job making sure we knew how to use the bikes and the seats were at the right height. Covid wise, the bikes were sanitized and everything felt safe. Definitely would rent from them again
My husband and I took a private electric bike tour with Sergio and had such an amazing time seeing Santa Barbara from a local's perspective - would highly recommend!

Place is close to the Harbor and the service is awesome, they have good looking bikes and they drive great. We arrived we no reservation on a Wednesday morning and we were in and out with our bikes in 15 minutes. Price is great and we went over our time and it was no big deal at all they simply charged us an extra 5 dollars. That's super cool. Good place to get your bikes
Nick was awesome! He was really helpful with every questions I had and gave me feedback after every wave I caught!:) Definitely will be taking lessons from him again!
Best rates in town! Rented two electric bikes for the day. Friendly and efficient service from Elias and Connor. 10/10 experience and highly recommended!

Two of us went on a really fun kayaking tour around the harbor and a little bit in open water with our tour guide Elias! Everything was organized and he made us feel taken care of by asking what we were looking for in the tour, how comfortable we were feeling to paddle further, etc. He's a wealth of knowledge and takes pictures of you out there as well! 
If you're looking for an easy going kayaking adventure in beautiful SB we definitely recommend it and Elias as your tour guide although all of the staff seem great. 

Thanks Elias!

Anna & James

This is seriously the best company! Staff is so friendly and helpful and always do whatever they can to accommodate and work with you. We live in Santa Barbara and definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting as well as locals. They're super close to the beach, making it a great spot to rent from!
Had an Amazing time paddling around the marina and beach in Santa Barbara.  Such friendly service and gave us ideas for where to go for dinner too!  Will be back for sure!

My wife and I rented 2 e-bikes for 24 hours. Rented a Specialized and a Rad Runner. Both in excellent condition and they even allowed me to try a different bike for the last remaining few hours. Pricing was very reasonable and they went out of their way to help us numerous times. Thank you!

My friend and I were in town for a few days and wanted to ride bikes along the beach and try out some wine tasting rooms in town. Connor at Cal Coast Adventures made it so easy and fun. Bikes were ready - adjusted for our heights, sanitized, with fresh helmets and bike locks when we arrived. The shop is tucked away but centrally located, rental price was affordable, and they honestly just couldn't have been nicer or more helpful. Thanks for running such a cool little shop and getting us up and running on some sweet beach cruisers for the day!

SB Fitness Tours has opened the door to numerous outdoor exercising opportunities that I've always wanted to try, but either didn't have the equipment to do so or the knowledge to do on my own.  I'm always complaining to my wife that I'm tired of going to the gym and doing the same monotonous routines every day so she signed me up for a mountain biking session with SB Fitness Tours about 9 months ago.  Since then, I have used them for mountain biking on numerous occasions, kayaking, stand up paddle boarding, trail running, resistance training and am soon to experience his road biking (as my wife got me a gift certificate for the holidays from them).  

It's not only the fact that I got to try out some top of the line equipment to see how I liked it prior to investing in my own gear (which I ultimately did with the help from the owner of SB Fitness Tours - Mitch Hawkins) but also the fact that while I'm experiencing something new I have a coach right there beside me teaching me the proper techniques and talking to me about nutrition and the various muscle groups that we're utilizing while working out.  The trainers make the whole experience fun and they know how to push you when you are ready for that next level.  I've climbed up some pretty amazing biking trails that I didn't think I was capable of doing and when I got to the top of the runs, the sites and subsequent downhill rides were well worth the sweat it took to get to the top.  

SB Fitness Tours is definitely on the top of my list for outdoor adventures and training in the beautiful surroundings that Santa Barbara has to offer.  Can't wait for my next session with the team.  Keep up the good work guys!

So much fun! Four of us took the electric bike tour of Santa Barbara led by the wonderful guide Nate,,,,,what a fantastic way to see the city!  We covered quite a bit of ground-beaches, Montecito, State Street, SB City College. Since we had toured the Courthouse ourselves the day before, Nate was great and guided us to other Santa Barbara gems, easily changed the tour for us.  Fun, relaxing, and highly recommended!

Such a great fat tire electric bike tour on the beach! The tour wasn't on the calendar when we were in town, so I called and they were able to make it work. The tides were not quite perfect for riding the whole beach, but Brody and Austin took extra care to take us in and out wherever it made the most sense. The bikes were awesome, riding on the beach was super fun, and I would highly recommend to anyone interested in a Santa Barbara adventure! Easy to park near the shop and they threw in a bonus round of riding in the Funk district, and gave us some great suggestions for restaurants.

We rented kayaks from cal coast adventures on East beach in Santa Barbara next to the pier. Maddie was awesome! The kayaks had backrests, they were located on the sand for easy access to the beach.  Maddie was super helpful and friendly.

We had a great walk-in experience renting 7-speed beach cruisers as the staff was very welcoming and informative!  To minimize contact during the pandemic, they asked us to make an online reservation on our phone which was a fast and easy experience.  Would definitely recommend!

What a fun time! Jimmy was a fantastic tour guide. Covered a huge amount of ground rather effortlessly with the electric assist on the bikes. Have visited Santa Barbara dozens of times but saw many hidden gems in this beautiful city for the first time, and got some great restaurant tips thanks to Jimmy's deep familiarity with the area.

Just went on my first paddle boarding experience and it was amazing!! Emily was my instructor and she was such a blast to hang out with, super friendly and made me feel so comfortable on the board right off the bat. I would definitely use this company again!

What a great business! I called and received amazing customer service from Connor right from the start. He went the extra mile to make sure we received the E-bikes, baby seats, helmets, bike locks and delivery we were looking for. He even called back to confirm with me. The delivery driver Jimmy was right on time, incredibly courteous and knowledgeable. I can't rave about this place enough!

My daughter and I had an awesome kayaking tour led by Andre who was super cool and informative and was very enjoyable to spend time with. Lots of seal sightings and some excellent memories were made! Thanks.

This is the 2nd time renting electric bikes from CCA. Awesome experience. We just had to fill out a short reservation form online and when we arrived, the bikes were waiting for us. They were cleaned/disinfected beforehand and adjusted to our heights. We got on and rode for over 3 hours. The staff is incredibly helpful and nice. Would recommend 100x over.

This is a fantastic bike shop a few blocks from the shore in beautiful Santa Barbara. My kids and I rented bikes and had a fun morning riding them on the beach. The process of renting the bikes was very easy as it was done complete online. I was able to rent the bikes at a great price the night before riding them, this made the rental process extremely smooth as we left with our bikes within 5 minutes of arriving at their location.

They even sent back some of my payment when we returned our bikes an hour early. This place had great staff, customer service and an online procurement process other bike shops should copy.
Great service.  They were great to book us by phone last minute on 4th of July.  These guys never disappoint

This group has some great options for cool excursions as a big group. The prices are competitive and the guides are amazing. We enjoyed both paddleboarding and mountain biking with them and would recommend them to any large group. The owner Mitch and his right-hand man Nathan are elite in customer service. We will definitely book with them again next year.

My girlfriends and I recently took a vacation in Santa Barbara and rented Bikes through Cal Coast and had the best time on our tour with Andrew!  It was fun to learn some fun facts about the beautiful beach city and he was so helpful in telling us the best local spots to eat and shop!  Would definitely recommend anyone to schedule this tour with them and ask for Andrew he was awesome!

The two hour bike ride was exceptional.  Driving the breach cruisers was like driving a Ferrari.  The handling was crisp, the gears were perfectly tuned and the seat was probably the most comfortable I'd ever experienced.  Best yet was our coordinator Connor.  He was funnier than Robin Williams and Chris Rock and gave us a really great deal.  Sweet! 

I'd highly recommended anyone visiting Santa Barbara to stop in and see Connor, they even provide surf lessons.  Best bargain in California bar none!

We took two e-bike trips during our three days in Santa Barbara, and Cal Coast Adventures was a wise choice for bike rentals and tours.  Both were led by guides -- day one was Dale, day two was Davis.  Our guides were locals who knew the areas well, and were excited about showing us (and the other members of our group) some parts of SB that we had not seen before, always keeping safety top of mind.  We had a blast!

The company takes great care to ensure that you are well-fitted to a bike, that the bike has been properly maintained and that you are comfortable and safe.  This was important as a few of us had never been on an e-bike!  Their selection of bikes from a large inventory is top-notch.

This was a fantastic way to see a beautiful city from the beaches to the "secret spots" on a bike.  As SB is a city with lots of traffic and where there are few designated bike lanes, Dale and Davis were pros in navigating us through the city, and we enjoyed our tours to the max.  Thanks so much to all who made our tours memorable and most of all, great fun !!!

My family and I are visiting Santa Barbara and thought we should try out some E-Bikes while seeing the city. Davis was our tour guide,he was amazing, nice, funny, and had awesome facts. We really enjoyed ourselves and recommend to anyone looking for a fun  and active experience in Santa Barbara.

Why don't more business understand the basics like these guys do?  (OK, I'm oversimplifying it and don't know shit about running a business but will proceed to opine as if I do...)
A fair price for a good product, delivered with friendliness.
  These guys... we called them twice on the phone (the second time with possibly moronic questions) and interacted with them twice more (once picking up the bikes and once dropping off)... always SO nice and friendly.  (That can't be easy when dealing with the general public!)
The website was great, we pre-ordered our bike rental and they had them waiting when we got there.  We parked in their parking lot... so easy.  No doing paperwork at a counter inside, no looking for parking.
The bikes were solid.

The actual corner they are on is about a half-mile from the beach and there is like a one block section that feels like you are on a homeless person obstacle course... nothing that felt dangerous but you were aware of the situation.
The staff is super friendly and helpful. Bikes were well maintained -- rented 5 bikes for 3 days and had no issues.

The guys at Cal Coast could not be more helpful - My son and I went for Mothers Day and we got there the bikes were all clean and ready to go.  They used all precautions and had face masks on.  Going on electric bikes all around Santa Barbara allowed me to see things I had never seen before.  They supplied us with awesome maps - of which they are on their website.   We were able to park our car there so no worries about meters or tickets.   We are fans and will be regulars.

This was by far the best experience to celebrate my boyfriends birthday. These bikes were amazing to ride and we even had observers say they wish they had our bikes instead of their manual bikes they rented. We ordered the regular e-bike and it was easy to handle. I don't think I can ever look at riding bikes the same after this experience.  It was my first time riding an e-bike. 

Cal Coast has a parking lot to park your car in for the day at no charge. Easy check in process. COVID-19 safe with employees wearing masks and unable to go inside to prevent crowding. They have a restroom available on-site. I highly recommend this place!

Wow! What a great experience.  We had such a wonderful time kayaking and getting a mini lesson on how to do it. The staff is incredibly friendly and they don't make you wait around. Since we went during Covid restrictions we observed the care the staff took to ensure the safety and abide by the regulations and social distancing. We will be back again

We stumbled upon this spot on accident and rented a kayak. Make sure you complete the forms and pay online! They don't do forms on the spot. The staff was AMAZING!!! Super kind and helpful. I feel like people are rude to them, because they all kept apologizing for doing nothing. Really good staff. EASY rental process. Beautiful landscape! Easy currents.

We did an ebike tour with Sergio.  The equipment was perfect, no issues.  Sergio was nice and knowledgeable and provided a wonderful tour around the beaches of Santa Barbara.  We could have rented ebikes and rode around on our own, but it was so much better with Sergio as our guide.  We covered more ground than we could have on our own, and it was just more relaxing without having to pause and find our way.  It was so worth it to do the tour, and Sergio was just awesome!

Phone customer service was great prior to booking.  The person who answered the phone (can't recall his name) was patient and answered all my questions.

Trust the 5 star rating! We chose to do the electric bike rentals (not the tours) and decided on the Specialized Turbo Como 3.0 as our electric bike choice. 

First things first is the parking. There's really no parking lot so you'll have to squeeze yourself on their lot which has their utility vans and other cars, or find street parking. Luckily enough, our reservation was on a Thursday morning around 11:30am and so we had space to park on their lot.

2nd was meeting Brody! Hopefully I'm not spelling his name incorrectly but he greeted us very nicely and was super chill and laid back with our reservation. He already had our bikes ready for us and got our names down and gave us a quick tutorial on the bikes. They were super easy to use. He even had a spare bike lock and phone holder for our navigation.

Finally our experience. It exceeded our expectations. We decided to follow the Cabrillo bike bath from santabarbaraca.com (just google bike routes in Santa Barbara) and used my phone as a navigation. Feel free to ask for a phone holder. 
Our reservation was 2 hours long, but honestly we could've easily gone for 3-4 hours or even the whole day if we went for a longer bike route. But our 2 hours went by so fast because we wanted to make stops and take a lot of pictures. I suggest 2 hours minimum, but 3 or 4 hours if you're planning on making stops to walk around and/or take pics. We stopped by Stearn's Wharf as well. 
Lastly were the bikes. The Specialized Como is super cool. In that whole 2+ hours we were biking, we only used about 10-15% of the battery and we biked a lot. The electric bikes makes the hills so much easier and you can go really fast.

Also want to add my recommended clothing / clothes to wear. We wore all dri-fit/moisture wicking clothes. Since we went in November, it wasn't too hot as compared to the summer, but the sun was still beaming on us. I suggest a long sleeve and under-shorts tights or very light pants because of the sun. I wanted to make sure I didn't get sun burnt so I chose a moisture wicking  long sleeve, compression pants and light athletic shorts on top. I also wore a bandana backwards to cover my neck and a hat.

Mitch from SB fitness tours is a great instructor with incredible equipment. If you're someone looking for an alternative to the gym and loves the outdoors, I highly recommend his tours.

On a group tour he had tons of high quality equipment and was a perfect instructor with neat ideas if you're interested in paddle boarding or kayaking. 

Would love to get back on that board and try some headstands or yoga. Great friendly vibe for people of all abilities and ages.

We took our first "ebike" tour this last weekend with SERGIO as our tour guide and we could not have been happier with our experience. He is a native of Santa Barbara and knew a lot about the city sights and landmarks from the Mission down to the Pier. Riding on an ebike was sooooooooo enjoyable that both my wife and I including the other couple that we went with have all decided to buy one for ourselves!!! We must have ridden 15-20 miles and were all more energized at the end of the tour than we were at the beginning (we are all in our early 50's).  If you consider yourself slightly out of shape/lazy in general an ebike is the answer to everything you ever wanted out of exercising. But this review is for SB Electric Bike Tour and not the ebikes themselves and for that we thank not only our awesome tour guide Sergio but the OWNER of the company as well (his name is Mitch) who we met and he could not have been nicer! I was very happy to give my business to Cal Coast Adventures especially since they have been hit so hard by this whole Covid-19 pandemic. Do yourself a favor and book a tour with Cal Coast and I can almost GUARANTEE it that you will have a better time than expected!

My son and I had an amazing first time kayaking yesterday thanks to Maddie!
It was my son's  first time kayaking and Maddie  explained everything the way he could understand and what to do with other boats, other kayakers, even with the stingrays.
she made everything so clear so my son did not have any worries on his first time on a kayak. Thanks to Maddy again we had an amazing memory and already made a plan to go back for a longer trip on a kayak with Cal cost adventures from LA to SB 
Oh I must add that you know we the mothers always have lots of stuff that we carry around in our back packs yes she kit only made sure that my bag was safe during our fun time but also she held on to my golden bracelet that broke  off just before I've gotten on the kayak!
Thank you Maddie fir everything! I recommend this place for everyone and all families
exquisite bike ride! wouldn't have had a nice ride if it weren't for their professionalism and excitement thanks to bryan and davis!
Very fast and easy to reNt fro them. Will come again. It was very clean and the guy waS great

Went to SB for the Weekend and booked a private Kayak tour with Orion! He was awesome! You could tell he loves his job and passionate about the environment! We really appreciated the fact he was so enthusiastic! We didn't know what to expect fully being our first time! He made us feel so at ease! On the private tour it's great because it's gives you a little more flexibly on where you can go! We were able to get this great picture to show off our first kayak endeavor. Check out our new friends to the left of us :) 
Whether you have been before or this will be your 1st time, you will enjoy the experience. Thanks again and hope we can do it again sometime!

5 stars for the above and beyond customer service, good vibes, and quality bikes.

My wife and I came to SB for the weekend to mountain bike. We stopped by this place because it was so convenient, literally RIGHT off the highway. Turns out they're really the only shop in town that has higher end mt bikes in addition to cruisers and road. We tested out a few bikes to find the right size and specs. I got a Specialized Camber 29 and she got a Stumpjumper 27.5. Super nice bikes.

Next the owner took the time to show tell us all about the local trails and recommend a good route to maximize our day. We talked for a while and they weren't in a hurry to get us out the door.

The shop gave me a good helmet, tube, and co2 set just in case.

What set this rental shop apart from others I'm used to is the relaxed and flexible atmosphere. Mitch and Andrew were both just super friendly. Will definitely come back to SB because the biking was great and of course coming back to Cal Coast.

Wow! What a fun way to see so many cool parts of Santa Barbara! Sergio was a great tour guide. Super friendly and not at all judgmental of my lack of bicycle skills! Seriously, though, he was the perfect guide and knowledgeable of the area. I highly recommend this fun tour.  Oh, the rest of the employees were very friendly and accommodating as well. We would definitely come back to Cal Coast Adventures again!

My husband and I rented two e bikes to ride around downtown Santa Barbara. Very easy to book online, affordable prices, we were able to arrange an hour before we wanted to rent the bikes. We rode around Montecito, butterfly beach, and downtown, and had a great time! Powerful and fun e bikes! Highly recommend! We rented in March 2021.
Great experience. We rented an ebike for our son. The Rad mini was a perfect fit. Cal coast team was attentive, friendly and overall professional. Highly recommend!

My son and I went on a guided kayak tour and loved it. Our guide was Ryan who was absolutely incredible. He was knowledgeable and made sure my son was having fun every step of the way. He took us on a tour of all the cool boats in the harbor. Ryan is fantastic and highly recommend this activity.
We had an awesome time with the best tour guide Truman! Very lovely way to get to know SB and enjoying the ride around town. Highly suggested!

We had a great time on our last minute kayak tour of the Santa Barbara harbor. Maddie was an excellent guide and the person who took my call wa super friendly and accommodating. The tour lasted an hour and a half which was perfect for our short day trip getaway from Los Angeles, especially after being in COVID lockdown for 4 months. We'll go again and hopefully for an even longer excursion.

Great company. We did surfing lessons and bike rentals with them. Kids loved surfing Mondos - great experience all around. So good that they are going back for a second time during our vacation. We also had a great experience when our friends rented bikes. Jessie went above and beyond when I rented a pannier for my bike, noticing that my bike (not a rental) seat looked off. He took it upon himself to fix it making it much a better ride. Brody was also super helpful in loading up bikes in our cars.

One day later, wanted to add to our review to give a shout out to Abraham who gave surfing lessons to my boys. he was amazing - kids had a great time and made a ton of progress. Thank you!

This was one of our favorite local city tours. My wife and I were visiting Santa Barbara for our wedding anniversary and it was a perfect way to explore a city which was nothing but marvelous. Connor our guide, was fantastic. He had a great sense of pride for his city. He was very informative and had good knowledge of the city's famed history and took us to some of the best photo spots. We were the only 2 people in the tour and he made us feel very comfortable all along. The tour itself was just as seen in their promotional video but the experience was special. Riding the bike along the hills and oceans with the gentle breeze and the beautiful weather was like a dream come true. We stopped at some of the best views in the town particularly the one overlooking the harbor over a small hill. Highly recommend this tour for everyone

Hello,
We had a great time!
The instructor was very helpful and friendly. Great service and would highly recommend to others.
We will definitely be coming back for more kayaking.
Thank you for the wonderful memories!
Cheers,

Props to Connor for hooking us up w the right bikes since we really didn't know what was best. Super friendly, helpful and professional. He helped us enjoy the afternoon ride. Will definitely rent from again.

My friends and I booked the private electric bike tour. We had a fantastic time! Our guide John was fun and super knowledgeable about the city, coast and surrounding towns like Montecito. The electric bike made it a lot easier to cruise around Santa Barbara. I will definitely be back for another adventure!
Brody was an excellent guide.  Our whole family of four had a great time.  He showed us all around Santa Barbara and made the trip fun and informative.  Would highly recommend!

Upon arriving we were greeted by the friendliest person named Brody, he was so great and started getting our bikes ready as we ordered them online because I think they're reservation only. The bikes are so cute and honestly the best choice for exploring Santa Bárbara. This place will be our go-to for every time we visit from now on! Brody you're awesome!
Rented a Paddle Board with Rose and she was amazing! Sanitized everything, easy to talk to, and super friendly! 10/10 experience.

I don't usually write reviews, but the service we received from everyone at CalCoast Adventures was 5 stars, and deserving of a great review!  We rented ebikes and toured around Santa Barbara and on the beach.  The bikes were clean and ready to go upon our arrival, and the staff were so helpful in making sure we were comfortable on the bikes and adjusting them to our needs.  The staff was friendly and welcoming, all of them.  Brody was our guide, and he was fantastic!  I cannot say enough good things about him.  He was everything you could want in a guide.  Well done Cal Coast Adventures!

My 13-year-old daughter and I went on the electric bike tour with Sergio leading us. What an amazing experience! He was so informative and sweet. My daughter and I were quite nervous that she wouldn't be able to figure out the bike, but Sergio had her ride it around on the street to warm her up. The tour was two and a half hours and we saw so much of Santa Barbara. I highly recommend this company and it's a perfect way to see the city. 
Thank you Sergio! The pad thai noodles were delicious!
Had a surf lesson today for our 3 kids. Griffin and Jessie were awesome with the kids and we can't wait to do it again!

Upon arrival we were warmly welcomed by our guide Sergio, our names were mentioned and we felt welcomed and with such a friendly atmosphere we had a fantastic start! The guide and tour was extremely good, very flexible (appreciate this!) and for that he deserves a special thanks. We had a great weather, which obviously also added to the experience. 


Our tour guide Sergio had such a warm personality and was highly motivated (recommendable!) to show us his native city. We (my husband and I) enjoyed the Ebikes tremendously. The scenery was beautiful and it was in such a quiet and peaceful environment. Seeing the 153 year fig tree was a great way to end .All respect for Sergio who does a great job, and is an excellent tour guide! 

Bob and I recommend Sergio to everyone!

By the way, I am a returning customer.
Took both the kayak tour in Santa Barbara and rented electric bikes.  Great service and wonderful time on both

I cannot say enough what a wonderful bike adventure my boyfriend and I had with Cal Coast on 9/26. We were fortunate to have Sergio as our guide and he really made our trip special. From the get go, Sergio welcomed us with a smile and the friendliest of demeanor. He went above and beyond to take care of us, greeting us, putting up our bikes on the truck, helping us pick helmets, making sure we had water and giving us details on the trail we were heading for. I can bike but I'm not an intermediate biker and Sergio made sure I felt comfortable and safe and he was always patient in spite of me nearly colliding into him twice. My boyfriend and Sergio connected right away and soon interacted like old buddies. The landscape of the trail was unforgettable and you couldn't help but feel grateful for all the natural beauty around you. The bikes were of high-quality and new-looking and definitely contributed to the reason why we managed some of the more challenging maneuvers on the trail. It's pretty clear that the people who run this business know what they're doing. Most of all, Sergio is why we enjoyed the tour so much. He loves mountain biking and loves people and he makes you feel like you're part of his family from the start. Thank you for all the memories.

Great day on an electric bike.
I called the day before and they recommend booking on line so I did.
Jimmy checked me in and it was super easy.
When I arrived to return bike I saw Jimmy and he said he just clocked out but took the time even though he was off the clock to check my bike in. The total time it took to check in my bike and check it out was two min. 
Loved my day on my bike and renting was super easy.
Thanks Jimmy!!!

Orion and Katelyn helped me with my SUP rental on 9/2/2020.  They were great!  Orion helped me carry my board to the shore because it was too heavy for me.  Katelyn gave me tips on where to paddle.  They both helped me choose between kayaking vs. paddleboarding.  Very chilled, friendly, and helpful vibe.  Nicely run business.
I had an extremely smooth and easy experience booking a stand up paddle board excursion with Cal Coast Adventures. The staff was friendly and knowledgeable and the paddle boarding was great! I

Had such a great time yesterday kayaking with Maddie at Cal Coast  Adventures... it started off a little crazy as my family is always  chaotic... we were late to our reservations (I hate being late) , parking is a pain and we couldn't find the So Cal Adventures tent so if you're not too familiar with West Beach give yourself time ... park in the parking lot it was only $6.00 and saves you the headache of looking for parking on a  (suggested) residential street that specifically states  permits required .. it's about a 5 min walk in the sand  to the tent. Once we got to the tent we were greeted by Maddie. This sweet girl was our knowledgeable guide. You have a hour and a half which was perfect. We never visit San Barbara, we usually stay in Carpinteria and eat in SB. It's so sad because it's only an We definitely will do this again next summer.

SB Fitness Tours was incredible!  My sister and I took out stand-up paddle boards yesterday and we were a little nervous.  The guide, Mitch, was so friendly and helpful! He carried the heavy boards for us, and told us just what to expect and how to do it.  I felt like a pro by the end of it.  I will definitely go out again with SB Fitness Tours!!

Nick was an amazing surf instructor! Can't recommend Cal Coast Adventures enough. They were able to accommodate despite some last minute changes outside of their control and still able to provide a great surf lesson. We had a great experience at Haskell's Beach with Nick who taught us a lot about the surrounding area and how to properly surf. We actually got up a few times on the board with his guidance. Thanks, Nick! :)

Great! We went there on 6/16/20 and the guy that helped us was great- super easy going and good instructions.  The bay was easy to navigate.  Our kids did it--11-14 and it wasn't a huge production.  Just easy.

Awesome experience here yesterday! The guys that took care of us on our way in and out were so incredibly warm and friendly and made the process super easy. Gave great suggestions on where to ride, what to do, options to see, eat, drink lol. 

Would definitely come back to rent from them! Customer service was top notch. Bikes were SO comfortable and worked super well for us. Paid 40 bucks for 2 hours for 2 people. 

What I also appreciate is you just pay for an hour and balance up at the end when you return your bike instead of having to decide how long you want to ride for when renting.

My fiancé and I did a private guided bicycling tour with Sergio, it was AMAZING!!! We had such a great time, Sergio is so passionate about Santa Barbara and showed us so many unique spots we would have never seen on our own. He took us around for 2.5 hours and we had a blast. Sergio was kind, warm, fun and gave us an experience we will never forget. He even gave us a tip on how to avoid traffic on our way back to LA! He took lots of great photos of us on my phone throughout the ride. A++++++ experience, don't even hesitate to go!!!!

Met Jimmy today at the Ritz for an e-bike rental. He was so nice and kind! He taught me how to use the e-bikes and was happy to tell me where I can ride! Definitely recommend stopping by the bike stand when checking in to the hotel.
Rented two MTB's from Cal Coast Adventures. Bikes were in great shape and the shop took extra time to make sure they fitted us correctly. Great Costomer service! Highly recommend renting from here!

We had a great time on our bike tour with Ryan! We were deciding to rent bikes and go on our own way versus having a tour around Santa Barbara! We are so happy we chose the latter! Great bike ride, especially with the electric bikes. The tour was 2 1/2 hours but went quickly and was very pleasurable since the bikes do a lot of the work since you can set how much pedal assistance you want with the bike. Therefore, the hills were no problem at all! Ryan did a great job keeping us entertained and answering our questions. We felt safe the whole time since he followed the safety rules of the street. It was our first time using an electric bike and I'm not very coordinated but the bikes were very easy to use. The price was right and overall, it was a wonderful, memorable experience. You should definitely try it on your first day at SB so you can see some sights and things you may want to see during your vacation.
Everything was great. Super friendly, helpful, gave us info on best places to go. Bikes were great.

Best bicycle rental experience I've had. Came into town looking for a road bike to rent for interval workout and road riding. Multiple options in my size, as well as pedal options, helmets & full repair kit. Also provided a map of local road rides and Connor identified a perfect stretch for me to do my interval workout. 

Andrew, who was wrenching, was lightning quick putting the right pedals on the Specialized Roubaix and adjusting seat height. 

While it's a good option for roadies, they had a wide variety of bikes for every interest. 

A great service, with super friendly folks. Everything I could ask for.

This business also identifies as Santa Barbara Bikes to Go -- same address, location and phone #. This review is also posted for that business.

Got helped by my boy Ryan & he was a great individual. Explained everything in a clear & simple manner that made it understandable for our whole group.  Wasn't able to get the other helpers names but they were also great. However my boy Ryan went above & beyond. Definitely would come back again. Best kayaking experience ever.

* This is a review during COVID season! *

This past Veterans Day holiday (last Wednesday), my boyfriend and I came up to Santa Barbara hoping to have a great time - including riding bikes along the coastline! I did a *lot* of research about where to rent bikes in SB in anticipation, and we settled on CalCoast Adventures!

---
The short version of my review would be:
Smooth, safe and quick rental process +  great sanitization + fantastic customer service + great competitive prices compared to the other bike rentals in SB = I'd highly recommend this rental place to any of my personal friends who are looking to bike in SB!

---

The long review: I wrote a lot in this review, so I'll try to keep it relatively concise and bullet-point my thoughts below.  


* The rental process: 
The whole process was fantastic and really smooth! We came sometime around 11 AM and started around 11:30. When we arrived to rent the bikes, there is space to park in their lot - so you can just pull in with your car. You can see their outdoor counter right below their sign as soon as you pull into the parking lot.

At the counter, they have a safe rental process where you start by scanning a QR code. When you check out the bikes, you sign a waiver form. The nitty gritty details of the rental process I don't know that well, as my boyfriend handled the check out process while I was getting our things ready- but it seemed really smooth and straightforward to me, and he had no problems or complaints!


* Sanitation/cleanliness:
The rental process is safe and hands-free for both checkout/in.
Everyone's wearing masks (and we wore ours also!).

You start renting by first scanning a QR code, and the only contact you really do is using their pen to sign the waiver form (and you can just sanitize your hands afterward, or bring your own writing utensil).

We were told that our bikes were sanitized beforehand! I think the best point regarding cleanliness that I observed was that when we later finished returning the bikes, from our car we could see them immediately starting to spray their bikes (with disinfectant, I'm reasonably assuming) and wipe them down thoroughly. To see it happen before our eyes personally gave me great peace of mind, because they seemed to really be on top of it and care about sanitation!


* Customer service: 
Other than their on-point sanitation, this was the highlight in my opinion. We were helped by Elias in renting out the bikes, and his friend when returning our bikes (we didn't catch your name - sorry! But you were great as well!). Both guys were incredibly kind and helpful throughout the whole process, answered all our questions, and Elias also gave us recommendations on where to bike (based on his experience giving bike tours for groups that come in)!  

We went to a roundabout based on Elias' recommendation and the view was beautiful! I don't think other rental places would necessarily give you info on where to go if they're using it for their tour guides -- wouldn't it be more beneficial for them if they kept the info for their customers who pay more $$ to tour? The fact that Elias gave the recommendations based on his own tour guide experience told us otherwise, and we had a really great time!

Also - they proactively lowered my bike seat and being on the shorter side, I was grateful that they took thought to that before we started riding! They explained all the parts of the bike, how to use them and the locks, etc. I definitely felt mentally prepared to ride after their quick + thorough explanation, which helps my peace of mind!


* The moolah. $
Personally, my boyfriend and I ultimately decided to ride their electric bikes for 2 hours (which I highly recommend - the electric bikes made our time more about fun and less about exercise! And the 2 hours was the perfect amount of time to ride up to Oceanside Park, the college roundabout for 10ish min, restroom break, and back to the rental place.) 

They have the best prices here, and since I did the research on bike rentals already, I figured I'd share the stats with you all. I attached it as a photo to my review! 

I narrowed the bike rentals in SB down to 3 places that seemed legit, safe, and $ budget friendly - using Yelp reviews, TripAdvisor reviews, and the SB visitor website.

There are more options available for all of these places, but I was mainly looking at one-day rentals for regular cruiser bikes, electric bikes, and possibly tandem (2 person/1 vehicle) bikes. Some places have more discounts available for you if you're planning to rent bikes from their location for 2+ days.

Literally the best place to go to rent bikes. Connor is awesome. We have rented from him every time we go to Santa Barbara. Also recommend the wine and bike tour with friends. We had a group for a bachelorette and it was awesome. Can't say enough about how easy it was to book everything. Don't look anywhere else!

We went on our adventure on September 12th. We got there a little early. Molly greeted us and then helped us get ready. She was extra attentive to everyone and was engaging with our ten year old. She made sure that we were all doing okay throughout and helped when I got sweat/sunscreen in my eye. She offered to take pictures throughout and sent pictures to us. Great young lady, great business.

Just rented electric bikes from Brody.  He was great about instructions on the operations of the bike. Very friendly and professional. I liked my RAD folding bike so much we purchased  one!  Great experience!
Ellias and Connor were the chillest and coolest dudes, super accomodating and provided us all the info and comfort we could ask for, even in a pandemic. Get them some bonuses!

We booked the group kayak tour the night before and it was one of the best experiences I've ever had. Our guide Maddie, was one of the sweetest people I've ever met. She made sure that we felt comfortable and had fun at the same time. She also adhered to Covid-19 safety guidelines by keeping her mask on until we were in the water. 
Thank you for a great experience!

This was our first time renting E-bikes and doing the guided tour of Santa Barbara and it was amazing! Our guide Nate was awesome and super friendly. He showed us the hidden gems of beautiful Santa Barbara and gave us a little history and background along the way. We will definitely be returning with the rest of the family. If you stop by ask for Nate!
As a Santa Barbara local entertaining Colorado friends, a wonderful time was had by all!  Connor was a fantastic guide.  Highly recommend!
Highly recommend getting your bike rentals here, excellent service, great variety of bikes.  They even had tandem bike which was a lot of fun.  Elias was very helpful and professional.  Thanks guys!

My wife and I rented a couple e bikes for the day and ended up riding all over SB. Soo much fun. The bikes were amazing and the batteries were still at 4 bars 24 hours later. Ask for Connor!! He was the best. Made sure the bikes were adjusted to each of us and told us all the great routes! FUN TIMES!!!

Came to Cal Coast Adventures in Santa Barbara to try out the RadBike series of ebikes. They opened at 9am and I arrived at 9:30am during the week. The place was hopping with people renting different types bikes. I made an appointment, rented and tested three Rad ebikes. Connor and Kyle were awesome!! They both made sure I was happy and their directions on riding the ebikes was perfect. They also had maps on where to take your bike. I will definitely come back again and will recommend this company to my friends and family.
Must do!! Our guide Elias was the best. Went above and beyond even provided a list of his recommendations. We took the beach ride which as amazing!!

So..decided to take the private electric bike tour and loved it!  Our Guide Sean was sensational! Going thru the Beach Paths, Streets and Vistas was easy with these bikes!  This should be at the top of everyones "Things to Do in Santa Barbara"  really, It was exhilarating!!  Thanks Sean!

We rented 4 beach cruisers for 2 hours, $80 total. Online reservation system very easy to use. Staff was friendly but after they brought out our bikes, they did not offer to help with seat adjustments until we asked for help. Helmets were included in the price but not offered to us (some were just laid out on the floor). The Santa Barbara location at 736 Carpinteria is in a sketchy part of town. Make sure everyone in your party is comfortable with riding in the streets. They are only 1/2 mile from the beach but will require riding on busy streets to get there. Bikes were disinfected and wiped down when we returned them.

My husband and I did a bike tour with Sergio today (4th of July). Luckily we were the only 2 on the tour so we had a private tour. This was our first time in Santa Barbara and nothing could have been better than this tour. Sergio showed us all of the main attractions you have to see when coming to SB along with other cool hidden gems. Thank goodness we rented electric bikes or else we wouldn't have been able to cover the almost 13 miles we did around Santa Barbara. Sergio rocks!
